analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet criticizes the US for repeatedly withdrawing from international agreements and institutions, framing this as evidence of unilateralism and power politics. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Applicable. The tweet portrays the US (the West) as irresponsible and hostile to multilateralism, fitting the depiction of the West as behaving immorally and engaging in power politics. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Not present; the tweet does not mention China’s cooperative stance or virtues. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not relevant. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not addressed; no discussion of China’s domestic system or values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) — Not addressed. CH6 (China is interesting culturally) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1 only.
